title: Warm Crunchy Syrian Goat Cheese Bowl
description: A hearty, earthy bowl of goat cheese, toasted nuts, roasted chickpeas, and sautéed spinach, finished with a sumac and honey drizzle.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C and spread the dry chickpeas on a baking sheet.
Roast the chickpeas for 15 minutes, turning once, until golden and crunchy.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté the spinach until wilted, about 3 minutes.
In a mixing bowl, combine the crumbled goat cheese, sumac, smoked paprika, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and honey.
Add the roasted chickpeas and sautéed spinach to the cheese mixture and stir until well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl and drizzle with extra olive oil.
Sprinkle the toasted nuts and chopped mint over the top for added crunch and freshness.
Serve the bowl warm for a comforting, indulgent meal.
